attrs.comment: These data were produced at ESACCI as part of the ESA Cloud CCI project.
attrs.history:
Dataset produced by DWDs CC4CL retrieval system installed at ECMWF in second phase of ESA Cloud CCI.
Kerchunk file created on 26/09/23
Kerchunk file last updated by CEDA on 03/10/23 in the context of the CCI Knowledge Exchange Project
attrs.keywords: EARTH SCIENCE > ATMOSPHERE > SATELLITES > CLOUDS > CLOUD PROPERTIES
attrs.license: ESA CCI Data Policy: free and open access
attrs.project: Climate Change Initiative - European Space Agency
attrs.summary: This dataset contains monthly Level-3 global cloud property products from satellite observations. Averaged onto a regular grid.
attrs.title: ESA Cloud CCI Retrieval Products L3 Output File
